Specially Appearing Defendant The Boeing Companys Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Simon S. Grille of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner / opposing party Susan Hahn

Ruling:
SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT THE BOEING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: The Boeing Company's motion for protective order is denied. Boeing did not demonstrate good cause for the relief requested as required by C.C.P. 2025.420. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Diana L. Gonzalez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #7935 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Susan Hahn To Perpetuate Testimony Of Richard Hahn By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick R. Campbell of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner / moving party Susan Hahn
Nicole E. Gage of TUCKER ELLIS LLP (415-617-2400), specially appearing for defendant / opposing party IMPulse NC, LLC
Carrie S. Lin of MANION GAYNOR & MANNING (415-527-2802), specially appearing for defendant / opposing party The Boeing Company
Lisa H. Lazarus of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (415-766-3203), specially appearing for defendant / opposing party Ericsson, Inc. and joinder John Crane Inc.
Daniel D. O'Shea of PERKINS COIE (415-344-7002), appearing for defendant / joinder Honeywell International Inc.
James N. Sinunu of SINUNU BRUNI, LLP (415-362-9700), specially appearing for defendant Southwire Company

RULING:
PETITIONER SUSAN HAHN'S PETITION TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF RICHARD HAHN BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Susan Hahn's petition to perpetuate testimony of Richard Hahn by videotaped deposition is granted. The petition meets the requirements of C.C.P. 2035.030(b) and does not violate section 2035.010(b). The petition demonstrates that the discovery requested may prevent a failure or delay of justice. (CCP 2035.050(a).) Venue is proper in the County of San Francisco. The deposition may take place at or near Mr. Hahn's home in Windsor, CA. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
